title: 90s Middle Part Flow
sectioning: a horseshoe section through the parietal ridge
angles: 90 degree internal graduation through the top with a 45 degree perimeter
clipper: Use a #2 guard low in the transition, then scissor-over-comb at the ridge
finish: Point cut the fringe and preserve temple softness
maintenance: Blow dry from the center and finish with light styling cream

title: Precision Skin Fade
sectioning: a low horseshoe split with a clear disconnection reference
angles: Keep the top square with minimal over-direction to protect weight
clipper: Open lever to skin, blend upward through 0.5, 1, and 2 guards
finish: Debulk the ridge with clipper-over-comb and refine the line with trimmers
maintenance: Refresh every 2 to 3 weeks to keep the fade crisp

title: Modern Textured Crop
sectioning: radial sections from the crown with the front kept slightly heavier
angles: Use 90 degree elevation through the interior and soften the fringe
clipper: Taper the temples with a #1.5 to #2 blend
finish: Deep point cut the top and keep the outline matte, not glossy
maintenance: Use clay for separation and air-dried texture

title: Modern Mullet Balance
sectioning: disconnect the crown panel from the perimeter to keep length visible
angles: Use low graduation in the back and preserve weight through the occipital
clipper: Taper the sideburns with a soft #2 to clipper-over-comb transition
finish: Slice the back for movement while keeping the neckline deliberate
maintenance: Diffuse with sea salt spray to exaggerate movement
